summary: This document is a formal Risk Management Report outlining the risk assessment activities for the AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform. It details the risk control measures implemented, confirms that overall residual risks are acceptable, and references related Standard Operating Procedures for software development and clinical evaluation. The report serves as evidence of compliance with quality management systems for medical device development.
